name: Steps
goal: Container for ce-step items that accepts JSON data or slot children and auto-numbers unnumbered steps.
description: Layout container for process / roadmap steps implementing CDR-005 dual-mode: JSON array via the data attribute takes priority; slot children are used otherwise; empty state rendered when neither is present. When auto-number is enabled (default), sequential numbers are assigned to ce-step children that have no n attribute. Non-ce-step slot children are passed through without interference (CDR-006). Direction (vertical|horizontal) controls the flex axis. In JSON mode the container creates ce-step elements inline from the data array, producing visually identical output to the equivalent slot markup.

props.name: data
props.description: JSON array of { n?, title, desc?, state?, meta? }. Non-empty data takes priority over slot children (CDR-005 resolution order).

props.name: direction
props.description: Layout axis. CDR-001 2-value style enum: vertical (default) stacks steps; horizontal flows them in a row.

props.name: autoNumber
props.description: When true, sequentially assigns n='1', '2', '3'… to ce-step children that have no n attribute, and to JSON items with no n.

slots.description: ce-step children (or any children, per CDR-006). Only ce-step elements receive auto-numbering. Used when data is empty (CDR-005).

cssVariables.name: --ce-step-list-gap
cssVariables.description: Gap between steps in vertical mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Gap between steps in horizontal mode.

sideEffects.description: Sets n attribute on ce-step children that lack it when auto-number is enabled (slot mode only).
sideEffects.reason: Auto-numbering requires writing to child elements to keep the slot-mode API consistent with JSON mode.

a11y.notes: The container itself carries no ARIA role; each ce-step child manages its own aria-current and visually-hidden state text. Empty state uses role='status' for live-region announcement.
